hyperedges.label: Quest Management System (creation, objectives, editing, deletion, viewing, dedicated window)
Dialog System (window, replicas, text editing, save/load, grouping, storage)
Lighting Engine (height-aware, occlusion-aware, soft-transition, optimized recalculation)

nodes.label: Quest Objectives (creation, rename, exp reward, hide-on-start, delete)
nodes.norm_label: quest objectives (creation, rename, exp reward, hide-on-start, delete)

nodes.label: Multiline Text Support in List Rendering
nodes.norm_label: multiline text support in list rendering

nodes.label: Quests and Dialogs Migrated to LinkedHashMap
nodes.rationale: Switched quest and dialog storage to LinkedHashMap, presumably to preserve insertion order while keeping key-based lookup.
nodes.norm_label: quests and dialogs migrated to linkedhashmap

nodes.label: Separation of Window Content vs. Window Decoration
nodes.rationale: Split window content functionality from window chrome/decoration so the two concerns can vary independently, enabling reusable content sections across window types.
nodes.norm_label: separation of window content vs. window decoration

nodes.label: Window Content Split into Sections
nodes.rationale: Extracted window content functionality into discrete sections to allow composition.

nodes.label: Support for Two Sections in One Window
nodes.norm_label: support for two sections in one window

nodes.label: Dialogs of One Object Grouped Under Nested Structure
nodes.norm_label: dialogs of one object grouped under nested structure

nodes.label: New Textures: Roads and River Bridge
nodes.norm_label: new textures: roads and river bridge

nodes.label: Separate-Surfaces Rendering Approach
nodes.rationale: Introduced a dedicated concept of surfaces rendered separately, ahead of element rendering, so ground/terrain layers render correctly beneath map elements.

nodes.label: Dialog Save/Load into Shared Map File
nodes.norm_label: dialog save/load into shared map file

nodes.label: Control Buttons as a Base-Window Section
nodes.norm_label: control buttons as a base-window section

nodes.label: Fix: Light Propagation into Unlit Spaces
nodes.norm_label: fix: light propagation into unlit spaces

nodes.label: Generic Window-Management Functionality
nodes.rationale: Extracted window management (borders, base-element list rendering, element management) into a generic implementation shared across window types, to reduce duplication.

nodes.label: Window Redesign Toward Light Color Tones
nodes.norm_label: window redesign toward light color tones

nodes.label: Light Calculation Accounting for Occlusion by Taller Objects
nodes.norm_label: light calculation accounting for occlusion by taller objects

nodes.label: Null/Zero Element Behavior (no placement, blue tile highlight)
nodes.norm_label: null/zero element behavior (no placement, blue tile highlight)
